skills.name: Strike to Injure
skills.description: Add +1 to all injury rolls caused by the model in hand-to-hand combat.

skills.name: Combat Master
skills.description: Gains extra Attack when fighting multiple enemies and immune to 'All Alone' tests.

skills.name: Weapons Training
skills.description: Can use any hand-to-hand combat weapon, not just equipment options.

skills.name: Web of Steel
skills.description: Gains +1 to all rolls on Critical Hit tables in hand-to-hand combat.

skills.name: Expert Swordsman
skills.description: May re-roll all missed attacks when charging with a sword.

skills.name: Step Aside
skills.description: May make additional 5+ saving throw against wounds in close combat.

skills.name: Quick Shot
skills.description: May shoot twice per turn with bow or crossbow.

skills.name: Pistolier
skills.description: May fire twice with brace of pistols or fire reloaded pistol same turn.

skills.name: Eagle Eyes
skills.description: Adds +6" to range of any missile weapon.

skills.name: Weapons Expert
skills.description: May use any missile weapon, not just warband options.

skills.name: Nimble
skills.description: May move and fire with normally-stationary weapons.

skills.name: Trick Shooter
skills.description: Ignores all cover modifiers when using missile weapons.

skills.name: Hunter
skills.description: May fire each turn with handgun or Hochland long rifle.

skills.name: Knife-Fighter
skills.description: May throw up to three knives/stars, dividing shots between targets.

skills.name: Battle Tongue
skills.description: Increases Leader ability range by 6".

skills.name: Sorcery
skills.description: +1 to spell casting rolls.

skills.name: Streetwise
skills.description: +2 to rare item finding rolls.

skills.name: Haggle
skills.description: Deduct 2D6gc from item price once per post-battle.

skills.name: Arcane Lore
skills.description: May learn Lesser Magic with Tome of Magic.

skills.name: Wyrdstone Hunter
skills.description: Re-roll one dice on Exploration chart when searching ruins.

skills.name: Warrior Wizard
skills.description: Can wear armour and cast spells.

skills.name: Scribe
skills.description: Create scrolls granting +2 to spell/prayer difficulty rolls.

skills.name: Mind Focus
skills.description: Re-roll one dice in spell/prayer difficulty roll.

skills.name: Tactician
skills.description: Reposition warriors after opponent setup, advance up to 12".

skills.name: Hunch
skills.description: Position 3 warriors in ruins 12" from enemies pre-battle.

skills.name: Magical Aptitude
skills.description: Attempt two spells per turn with Toughness test risk.

skills.name: Animal Handling
skills.description: Improves animal training; animals use handler's Leadership within 6"; ignores stubbornness in base contact.

skills.name: Tomb Raider
skills.description: Re-roll one dice on Exploration chart if not out of action.

skills.name: Trap Expert
skills.description: Never triggers traps himself.

skills.name: Driver
skills.description: Re-roll Out of Control chart results for wagons.

skills.name: Strategist
skills.description: Hero misses battle to gain +1 campaign point afterward.

skills.name: Scholar
skills.description: Choose new spells/prayers or reduce difficulty of known one by -1.

skills.name: drive chariot
skills.description: Required to charge while driving a chariot.

skills.name: Mighty Blow
skills.description: +1 Strength bonus in close combat (excluding pistols).

skills.name: Pit Fighter
skills.description: +1 to WS and +1 to Attacks when fighting inside buildings or ruins.

skills.name: Resilient
skills.description: Deduct -1 Strength from all hits against him in close combat.

skills.name: Fearsome
skills.description: Causes fear in opposing models.

skills.name: Strongman
skills.description: May use double-handed weapons without striking last penalty.

skills.name: Unstoppable Charge
skills.description: +1 to Weapon Skill when charging.

skills.name: Handyman
skills.description: Can repair one damaged wagon wheel when stationary.

skills.name: Beastmaster
skills.description: Can attempt to control animals in hand-to-hand combat via Leadership test.

skills.name: Leap
skills.description: May leap D6" in movement phase in addition to normal movement.

skills.name: Sprint
skills.description: May triple Movement rate when running or charging.

skills.name: Acrobat
skills.description: Can fall/jump from up to 12" with Initiative test, re-roll failed Diving Charge rolls.

skills.name: Lightning Reflexes
skills.description: Will 'strike first' against chargers, using Initiative to determine order.

skills.name: Jump Up
skills.description: May ignore knocked down results when rolling for injuries (with exceptions).

skills.name: Dodge
skills.description: Avoid missile weapon hits on D6 roll of 5+.

skills.name: Scale Sheer Surfaces
skills.description: Can climb up/down twice normal Movement height without Initiative tests.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.description: Placed last anywhere on the table, more than 12" from the enemy, out of line of sight. If both players have infiltrating models, roll off for each model, lowest sets up first

skills.name: Fury of Khaine
skills.description: May follow up 4" after taking all opponents OOA; starts new combat next turn; no follow-up in opponent’s turn.

skills.name: Fey Quickness
skills.description: Ignores melee/missile on 6; improves to 4+ with Step Aside or Dodge in relevant area.

skills.name: Master of Poisons
skills.description: If not searching for rare items, may make D3–1 Dark Venom doses for next battle (cannot sell/trade).

skills.name: Powerful Build
skills.description: May choose Strength skills.

skills.name: Frenzied Charge
skills.description: May make a 4" follow-up move if all opponents taken OOA; next combat counts as charging.

skills.name: Poisoner
skills.description: If no rare search, may make D2 doses of Dark Venom for next battle (not sellable or tradeable).

skills.name: Marksman of Naggaroth
skills.description: Ignores long range penalty with crossbows; if stationary, fires repeater crossbow twice (no penalty) or three times (–1 penalty).

skills.name: Will to Survive
skills.description: On death Serious Injury, pass Leadership to survive (miss D3 battles instead).

skills.name: Keen Sight
skills.description: Spots Hidden enemies at twice normal distance (2× Initiative).

skills.name: Powerful Build
skills.description: May choose skills from the Strength table. May not be taken by the Sorceress. Max 2 warriors per warband.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.description: Deployed after opponent, anywhere on table out of sight and more than 12" from enemy.

skills.name: Soul Hunger
skills.description: If this warrior takes an enemy out of action in close combat, gain +1 Attack for the rest of the battle (max +2).

skills.name: Master of Blades
skills.description: Parries succeed on beating or matching opponent’s hit rolls; with two parry weapons, may parry two attacks; may re-roll failed parries with two Dwarf axes.

skills.name: Extra Tough
skills.description: May re-roll Serious Injury dice once; second result must be accepted.

skills.name: Resource Hunter
skills.description: May modify one Exploration dice roll by +1 or -1.

skills.name: True Grit
skills.description: Injury table: 1–3 knocked down, 4–5 stunned, 6 out of action.

skills.name: Thick Skull
skills.description: 3+ save to avoid being stunned (2+ with helmet), treat stunned as knocked down.

skills.name: Combat Master
skills.description: Parries succeed on matching opponent's hit rolls; with two parry weapons may parry two attacks.

skills.name: Ferocious Charge
skills.description: Slayer may double attacks on charge, suffers –1 to hit that turn.

skills.name: Monster Slayer
skills.description: Always wounds on 4+, unless strength means a lower roll is needed.

skills.name: Berserker
skills.description: +1 to hit rolls on the charge.

skills.name: chaos engineer
skills.description: +3 on Chaos armour/Obsidian Weapons search rolls; ignores Rarity/Gift of Chaos; may not wear Chaos Armour.

skills.name: tyrant
skills.description: Leader may re-roll failed Rout tests if not down/stunned; if leader OOA, warband tests immediately.

skills.name: Unlimited hatred
skills.description: Suffers hatred against everyone.

skills.name: True Grit
skills.description: Injury table: 1–3 knocked down, 4–5 stunned, 6 out of action.

skills.name: Thick Skull
skills.description: 3+ save to avoid being stunned (2+ with helmet), treat stunned as knocked down.

skills.name: Ferocious Charge
skills.description: Slayer may double attacks on charge, suffers –1 to hit that turn.

skills.name: Monster Slayer
skills.description: Always wounds on 4+, unless strength means a lower roll is needed.

skills.name: Berserker
skills.description: +1 to hit rolls on the charge.

skills.name: Deathwish
skills.description: Immune to all psychology; never tests when alone.

skills.name: Deathblow
skills.description: If OOA in HtH, immediately make remaining attacks, even if stunned/knocked down.

skills.name: Relentless
skills.description: Failed charge may still move full distance toward target.

skills.name: Axe Mastery
skills.description: May reroll missed attacks with axe or Dwarf axe on charge.

skills.name: Songster
skills.description: Models within 6" reroll Leadership with +1 Ld (max 10).

skills.name: Song of Honor
skills.description: If Slayer dies, one surviving Slayer Hero gains +2 XP.

skills.name: Shaggy Hide
skills.description: The model gains a 6+ Armour Save that can be combined with other armour as normal.

skills.name: Mutant
skills.description: May buy one mutation (see Mutants rules).

skills.name: Fearless
skills.description: Immune to fear and All Alone tests.

skills.name: Horned One
skills.description: Makes an additional Attack with base Strength on a charge.

skills.name: Bellowing Roar
skills.description: Chief may re-roll failed Rout tests.

skills.name: Manhater
skills.description: Hates all Human warbands (per hatred rules).

skills.name: Fearless
skills.description: Immune to fear and All Alone tests.

skills.name: ’ard ead
skills.description: 3+ save to avoid being stunned (2+ with helmet), treat stunned as knocked down.

skills.name: waaagh!
skills.description: May add +D3" to charge range.

skills.name: ’ere we go!
skills.description: May ignore fear tests when charging.

skills.name: da cunnin’ plan
skills.description: Boss may re-roll failed Rout tests while active.

skills.name: well ’ard
skills.description: +1 to all armour saves.

skills.name: ’eadbasher
skills.description: Hand-to-hand knocked down results count as stunned instead.

skills.name: proven warrior
skills.description: Black Orc Young’un with 25 XP may gain Black Orc Warrior status and follow their rules.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.description: Placed last anywhere on the table, more than 12" from the enemy, out of line of sight. If both players have infiltrating models, roll off for each model, lowest sets up first

skills.name: See in Shadows
skills.description: May always charge unseen enemies if able to reach them.

skills.name: Hide in Shadows
skills.description: Enemies halve Initiative when spotting this Hidden model.

skills.name: Sniper
skills.description: May shoot/cast while Hidden; if target survives, tests Initiative to spot Sniper.

skills.name: Powerful Build
skills.description: May choose Strength skills.

skills.name: Master of Runes
skills.description: +1 to dispel with Elven Runestones; may let one warrior re-roll armour or Parry save once per battle.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.description: Deployed after opponent, anywhere on table out of sight and more than 12" from enemy.

skills.name: Powerful Build
skills.description: May choose skills from the Strength table. May NOT be taken by Shadow Weavers. Max 2 warriors per warband.

skills.name: Ferocious Charge
skills.description: Slayer may double attacks on charge, suffers –1 to hit that turn.

skills.name: Monster Slayer
skills.description: Always wounds on 4+, unless strength means a lower roll is needed.

skills.name: Berserker
skills.description: +1 to hit rolls on the charge.

skills.name: Bulging Biceps
skills.description: Ignores heavy weapon penalties; Strength bonus applies every round.

skills.name: Force of Will
skills.description: May roll D6 ≤ Toughness after OOA to get back up; harder each round; removed after second OOA.

skills.name: Arms Master
skills.description: Ignores ‘difficult to use’ weapon rules; can combine any weapons.

skills.name: Body Slam
skills.description: May charge with single +1S, +1 to hit attack, crits on 5+; no weapon bonuses.

skills.name: Grizzled Veteran
skills.description: Immune to all psychology.

skills.name: black hunger
skills.description: May gain +1 attack and +D3" move this turn; suffers D3 S3 hits after, no save.

skills.name: tail fighting
skills.description: May use tail to wield shield, knife or sword; gains extra attack or +1 armour save.

skills.name: wall runner
skills.description: No Initiative test needed to climb walls or sheer surfaces.

skills.name: art of silent death
skills.description: Fights bare-handed with no penalty, counts as two weapons, crits on 5–6. Stacks with Fighting Claws.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.description: Placed last anywhere on the table, more than 12" from the enemy, out of line of sight. If both players have infiltrating models, roll off for each model, lowest sets up first

skills.name: Black Hunger
skills.description: The Hero may declare at the beginning of his turn that he is using this skill. Add +1 Attack and +D3" to total move for the duration of his own turn, but suffers D3 S3 hits with no armour save at the end of the turn.

skills.name: black hunger
skills.description: May gain +1 attack and +D3" move this turn; suffers D3 S3 hits after, no save.

skills.name: censer bearer
skills.description: Gains frenzy ; may only use censer in close combat.

skills.name: rotten body
skills.description: Immune to poison/disease; recovers automatically if OOA from failed censer test.

skills.name: contagious
skills.description: Models who put this warrior OOA must test Toughness or take an automatic wound (6 always wounds); undead/possessed exempt.

skills.name: ignore pain
skills.description: Treats Stunned injuries as Knocked Down.

skills.name: Virtue of Purity
skills.description: Dispel spells cast against him on 4+ (natural dispel).

skills.name: Virtue of Valour
skills.description: May re-roll failed to hit rolls vs. enemies with higher Strength.

skills.name: Virtue of Discipline
skills.description: Once per game, may re-roll failed Rout test if not out of action, stunned, or knocked down.

skills.name: Virtue of Noble Disdain
skills.description: hates all enemies with shooting weapons.

skills.name: Virtue of Impetuous
skills.description: May add +D3" to move when charging (roll before moving).

skills.name: Renowned Virtue
skills.description: May learn one Virtue from the Bretonnian Knight Virtues list; may only take once.

skills.name: Questing Vow
skills.description: If fighting fear-causing enemy, may re-roll Leadership tests once, second result applies.

skills.name: Shield Bash
skills.description: May make extra attack each turn with shield/kite shield at –1 Strength (counts as club).

skills.name: Bulging Muscles
skills.description: Keeps Strength bonus from Flails/Morning Stars after first combat round.

skills.name: Untiring
skills.description: Ignores armour movement penalties on foot; save never worse than 5+ vs non-magical effects.

skills.name: Animal friendship
skills.description: Animals never attack him; up to two wardogs do not count toward warband size.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.description: Placed last anywhere on the table, more than 12" from the enemy, out of line of sight. If both players have infiltrating models, roll off for each model, lowest sets up first

skills.name: master trapper
skills.description: Trip wire range 4"; traps trigger on 2+.

skills.name: foul odour
skills.description: Living enemies –1 to hit in close combat; cannot carry flames; fire attacks +1 Strength vs him.

skills.name: pathfinder
skills.description: Roll one extra D6 in exploration; only one pathfinder per warband.

skills.name: hide in shadows
skills.description: Enemies halve Initiative when trying to spot this Hidden model.

skills.name: Infiltration
skills.description: Deployed after opponent, anywhere on the table out of sight and more than 12" from any enemy model.

skills.name: Pathfinder
skills.description: Roll one additional D6 during the exploration phase. A warband may only contain one pathfinder.

skills.name: Hide in Shadows
skills.description: Enemy models must halve their Initiative when attempting to find this warrior when he is Hidden.
